The BENE_ID field is used to cross-reference data for each beneficiary across all claim and assessment data files.
STATE_CD State Code CHAR 2 This field specifies the state as it appeared in the MAX PS file. 2 character postal state code
MSIS_ID Encrypted Medicaid State ID Number CHAR 20 MSIS Identification Number
DM_SOURCE Dual or Medicaid only enrollee CHAR 1 This field specifies whether enrollee was dually enrolled in Medicare Medicaid during the year, or
